title: All if ... else if constructs shall be terminated with an else clause
description: All "if ... else if" constructs shall be terminated with an "else "clauseAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode Smellmisra-c++2008Why is this an issue?More InfoThis rule is a strict implementation of a MISRA (Motor Industry Software Reliability Association) rule. MISRA defines best practices for developing safety-critical software.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: All if ... else if constructs shall be terminated with an else clause
